metadata.title:
Railroad to Cut


OFT Myers Falls

pages.raw_text:
Judging by the late operations of
the surveyors in the employ Of the
Spokane Falls & Northern, the town
of Meyers Falls may soon pass out
OF existence as regards it's being a
railway point. For a month past a
crew has been working south of
Meyers Falls and also north of there
as far as Marcus. Their object is to
make a new line and cut out all the
old curves, some of which are as
sharp as 10 degrees, and as result
of the work six-degree cruves will
be the highest on the line. 1t will
be necessary on account of having
changed the line to make it fully
nine miles longer and to pass by
Meyers Falls and through the town
of Kettle Falls. Engineer Whitcomb
is in charge of the corps.
